name: BenchSci
description: BenchSci is an AI-powered biopharma R&D platform offering EMET, an integrated biology workbench for autonomous preclinical drug discovery. The platform provides access to 85M+ reagent and model system records, 38M+ scientific publications curated by PhD scientists, and an 858M-node knowledge graph.

itemOffered.name: BenchSci API
itemOffered.description: REST API for searching scientific reagents, experimental data, literature, antibodies, and accelerating preclinical drug discovery workflows. Provides programmatic access to BenchSci's curated database of 85M+ reagent and model system records.

subjectOf.headline: The Fragmented Nightmare of Modern Drug Discovery Ends Here. We've Been Building EMET for a Decade. Here It Is.
Scientific Integrity by Design: Engineering Disciplined AI for Preclinical R&D
Introducing LEAP: The Evidence-based AI Engine for Predicting Novel Biology and Experimental Design
